pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project intends to run on JDK 21; without this, the compiler may not enforce JDK 21 features or compatibility checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JSON-P dependency from javax.json to jakarta.json for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.json is not available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x); using it causes compile errors or missing class runtime exceptions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Jackson JSON-P datatype from JSR-353 (javax) to Jakarta JSONP.
pom.xml.why_exists: jackson-datatype-jsr353 depends on javax.json, which is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x/Jakarta EE 9+; causes compile errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for cross-compilation targeting JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures bytecode compatibility with JDK 21 and prevents usage of APIs not available in the target release.

src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated JSR353 Jackson module with the modern JSONP module for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/com/inlaco/crewmgrservice/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.jsr353.JSR353Module is removed in newer versions of jackson-datatype-jsr353 (often aligned with Java 21/Spring Boot 3.3 upgrades), causing a compile error if the import or usage remains.
